emails.subject: Are you ignoring me?
emails.body: Are you ignoring me? ( Heather Kroll

emails.subject: RE: Are you ignoring me?
emails.body: RE: Are you ignoring me? NO....WHAT'S UP? To: Stepenovitch, Joe

emails.subject: RE: Are you ignoring me?
emails.body: RE: Are you ignoring me? Sitting in the Pres. Club waiting for my flight. You never responded to my yoga question! Are you going to Austin? Heather Kroll

emails.subject: RE: Are you ignoring me?
emails.body: NO YOGA FOR ME....AND I'M GOING TO AUSTIN!! CAN'T WAIT... CAN YOU STILL GET MESSAGES WHILE ON THE FLIGHT? To: Stepenovitch, Joe

emails.subject: RE: Are you ignoring me?
emails.body: RE: Are you ignoring me? Sometimes. I'm supposed to turn it off, but messages usually store until I turn it on. I land around 2:30 and have a two hour drive after that. Are you going to the game? I am soooo jealous. Wish I could go with you... Heather Kroll

emails.subject: RE: Are you ignoring me?
emails.body: ME TOO...BUT WE WOULDN'T BE WATCHING THE GAME! WHERE SHOULD WE STAY? RUDY IS COMING UP ON SATURDAY AND I'M LEAVING ON SUNDAY MORNING! To: Stepenovitch, Joe

emails.subject: RE: Are you ignoring me?
emails.body: RE: Are you ignoring me? Yes we would watch the game! And celebrate a longhorn victory! Good luck finding a decent place to stay. How much do you want to spend? The driskol hotel on 6th street is great and the 4 seasons is wonderful. Not quite as much is the omni (downtown), hyatt on the lake or sherton. I think there's a marriott down town too. I'd say call me on sunday but I know your aversion to the phone. Have fun. Think of me once or twice. H Heather Kroll
